data.name: Shady Lewd Kart
data.detailed_description:
Shady Lewd Kart takes go karting party games and mashes it with a dating sim to give you fast power sliding game play, sexy power-ups and lewd unlocks. The first ever Ecchi Kart game!

Powerslide around crazy tracks from ghost houses, speedways and even some of your favorite lewd games. Pick up as many dating items as you can and present them to the 'Pitgirls'.



Unlock lewds in a gallery jam packed with sexy content. Play along with your favorite racers, unlock their stories and help them to get laid!



What would a racing game with lewd character be without guests? We have over 45 characters from your favorite hentai games and IP's across the globe, making this the BIGGEST crossover in the sexy community!

With more guest characters to announce, multiplayer, seasonal events, City Mission Mode and loads more unlocks, Shady Lewd Kart will be the thiccest lewd game you will ever play!




-The BIGGEST crossover NSFW video game in history!!!
-Over 60 racers from the worlds hottest hentai games and animations!
-Dozens of skins and hats to unlock and dress up your driver!
-Echo Racers (Characters that have multiple skins with unique voice packs such as Faye from Future Fragments or Dealer from Flipwitch!
-Karts, boats, spaceships...you name it! Over 50 karts to drive from the Newgrounds tank to spider waifus!
-Use Wet Panties to slip up players, Buttplugs as mines and Vibrators to give yourself a speedboost!
-Spend hard earned Shadybux at Silvie's Shop...or any other sleezy store you may find...
-Episodic Dates & Cups (Date Pitgirls like Onyx from Pure Onyx or Sunny from Faulty Apprentice, win the cup and their panties!
-Over 300 unlockable NSFW CG's and animations from dozens of famous lewd artists!
-25+ VA's breathing life into each character such as SilkyMilkVoices, PixieWillow, IvyWilde and DornVa!
-No Nut Mode: Help the ladies climax while powersliding for the highscore. Edge them to victory!
-In Game and Seasonal Events to challenge your skills and unlock even more sexy content!
-Time Trial and compete against other gooners of the world on leaderboards!
-Multiplayer, Battle Mode, Kumbomb Mode and more to make party night extra steamy!
-City Crisis Mode (Coming Soon) Take on the Final Thot in a series of challenges and unlock dozens of collector cards!
-Hundreds of Secrets, Easter eggs and unlocks that pay tribute to the world of NSFW games and media!

data.short_description: Shady Lewd Kart takes go karting party games and mashes it with a dating sim to give you fast power sliding game play, sexy power-ups and lewd unlocks. The first ever Hentai Kart game!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“Only after playing Shady Lewd Kart have I discovered how much I craved a mashup between Mario Kart and adult games. Shady Lewd Kart has mashed together the joy of Mario Kart’s gameplay with lewd unlockables and characters.”
LewdPixels

“I like racing games and Shady Lewd Kart has the potential to become an entertaining game with a sexy aspect”
KinkyGaming

“This is an “adult” game with enough real gameplay and story to play without heed to the “adult” content. In truth, the sexy stuff is icing on the cake.”
Wombat Trap

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1.2ghz
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 mb Video Memory
  • 音效卡: AMD High Definition
